message:
test(core,db): add 49 tests for pattern_overlap, conformal, and timestamps

- pattern_overlap.rs: 38 new tests covering normalize_pattern, has_glob_meta,
  CompiledPattern API (is_glob, first_literal_segment, matches, overlaps),
  segments_overlap, segment_pair_overlaps, and edge cases (empty, brace,
  question mark, star single-level, self-overlap)
- conformal.rs: 5 new tests (constant data narrow interval, empirical
  coverage None before predictions, getters, PredictionInterval debug/clone,
  even calibration count)
- timestamps.rs: 6 new tests (RFC 3339 offset, bare datetime, invalid input,
  ISO roundtrip precision, ClockSkewMetrics default/clone/debug)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
